title: Spicy Japanese Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with tofu and a variety of vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots and broccoli

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the stir fry sauce and spicy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and tofu, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
